commands.review_summary:
The PR suppresses full-CLI startup progress for JSON-mode invocations, adds a stdout-TTY gate for Clack spinners, and adds focused CLI progress regression tests.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +39. Total +48 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main creates startup progress before full Commander parsing on non-routed JSON paths, and the pinned Clack spinner defaults to stdout. I did not run a live interactive TTY repro in this read-only review.
